bead.title: ADR-022 step 5: derived-view GraphQL schema + UI workers panel migration
bead.description: GraphQL schema: workers { id, project, harness, state, last_event_at, mirror_failures_count, had_dropped_backfill, current_bead, current_attempt }. UI workers panel surfaces freshness indicators, duplicate-worker display, and 'trusted-peer reported, not authoritative' labeling. ~400 LOC frontend + ~100 LOC backend.
bead.acceptance:
1. GraphQL workers query exposes the named fields.
2. Resolver reads from server runtime registry.
3. UI workers panel renders new fields; freshness indicator + duplicate-worker visible.
4. UI labels reported data appropriately.
5. Tests: TestGraphQL_Workers_FreshnessFields, TestGraphQL_Workers_MultipleWorkersPerProject.
6. Playwright e2e: workers panel renders fixture state.
7. cd cli && go test green; bun test + bun test:e2e green; lefthook pre-commit passes.
8. WIRED-IN: integration test (TestWorkersPanel_LiveTransitions) starts a real worker; asserts the workers panel observes connected state within 30s; advances time past 2× probe interval without events; asserts state transitions to 'stale'; advances past 10× probe interval; asserts 'disconnected'. Not fixture-based — exercises live data flow with timing.
